task: Rebuild Harness LLM operations from zero base

governance_bootstrap.summary: Model routing, cost gates, local-first processing, and completion evidence rules were reviewed.
Unknown provider state must not be presented as available and runtime changes require real verification.

changes: Added zero-base routing strategy with deterministic and local-first work classes.
Defined subscription, API key, CLI authentication, and quota as separate evidence fields.
Changed .env.example paid API budget default to zero.
Corrected Harness OS LLM inventory labels and added quota_status plus Ollama local entry.
Updated Costs page to expose quota_status and distinguish unknown quota from configured credentials.

verification.name: CLI inventory
verification.command: claude auth status; codex --version; gemini --version; copilot --version
verification.result: Claude reported loggedIn=false; Codex, Gemini, and Copilot binaries were installed; remaining token/quota balances were not exposed.

verification.name: historical token usage inventory
verification.command: psql harness_dev aggregate api_cost_log by provider/model
verification.result: Recent 30-day usage showed Ollama 52 calls, Google 32, Anthropic 2; historical totals showed premium-heavy Gemini/Claude usage.

verification.name: costs UI production build
verification.result: TypeScript and Vite build passed after quota_status display changes.

residual_risk: Exact ChatGPT Pro/Codex, Claude, Gemini, and Copilot remaining quotas require authenticated account pages or provider quota endpoints and were not available from this workspace.
Ollama server health was not reachable from this shell and must be probed on the runtime host before batch execution.
